Module 8 - Lesson 1
Quick Primer On Fulfilling Your 6FFF Orders:
3 Main Digital Ways To Fulfill Your Products:!
• Encrypted Download!
• Secure Digital Delivery Platform/Membership Site!
• Password-Protected Web Page

-- 1 of 4 --

Module 8 - Lesson 1
Quick Primer On Fulfilling Your 6FFF Orders:
Encrypted Download:!
• Some Carts Provided This As A Feature!
• Paid Services 	(i.e. 	DigitalGoodsStore.com)!
• Pro: Decreases Piracy!
• Con: Additional Fee (If not included in your cart)

-- 2 of 4 --

Module 8 - Lesson 1
Quick Primer On Fulfilling Your 6FFF Orders:
Secure Digital Delivery Platform/Membership Site:!
• Fully Customizable Plugins 	(i.e. 	WishlistMember.com)!
• Pro: Decreases Piracy, Can Be Integrated With Aweber!
• Con: Paid, Learning Curve

-- 3 of 4 --

Module 8 - Lesson 1
Quick Primer On Fulfilling Your 6FFF Orders:
Password-Protected Web Page:!
• Already Built Into Wordpress!
• Pro: Free, Very Easy To Implement!
• Con: Password Can Be Passed Around

-- 4 of 4 --
